## CreatePublicProfileInput variable

Input schema for creating a new PublicProfile. Omits auto-generated fields (id, timestamps).

**Signature:**

```typescript
CreatePublicProfileInput: z.ZodObject<
	Omit<
		{
			id: z.ZodString
			agentId: z.ZodString
			createdAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
			updatedAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
		},
		'id' | 'createdAt' | 'updatedAt'
	>,
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		agentId: string
	},
	{
		agentId: string
	}
>
```
